cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which book Dave ends up with after all the trades. The problem starts with each of the five friends having their own book. Let me list out the initial books: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: Ulysses - Claire: The Fellowship of the Ring - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Now, there are a series of trades. Let me go step by step. First trade: Claire and Bob swap books. So after this, Claire would have Ulysses and Bob would have The Fellowship of the Ring. Let me update that: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Ulysses - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Second trade: Claire and Dave swap books. Claire has Ulysses, Dave has Lolita. After swapping, Claire gets Lolita and Dave gets Ulysses. Now: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Lolita - Dave: Ulysses - Eve: Catch-22 Third trade: Dave and Alice swap books. Dave has Ulysses, Alice has Moby Dick. After swapping, Dave gets Moby Dick and Alice gets Ulysses. Updating: - Alice: Ulysses - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Lolita - Dave: Moby Dick - Eve: Catch-22 Fourth trade: Dave and Bob swap books.
